scripts.build:lambdas: npm run build:checker && npm run build:api
scripts.deploy:checker: npm run build:checker && powershell Compress-Archive -Path dist/checker/index.js -DestinationPath dist/checker.zip -Force && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name briarwood-status-checker --zip-file fileb://dist/checker.zip --profile cdk-admin
scripts.deploy:api: npm run build:api && powershell Compress-Archive -Path dist/api/index.js -DestinationPath dist/api.zip -Force && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name briarwood-status-api --zip-file fileb://dist/api.zip --profile cdk-admin && node scripts/publish-api-version.js
scripts.check: npm run build:lambdas && cd frontend && npx tsc -b --noEmit
